data.metadata: {"description":"Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!

data.metadata: {"description":"Met Cristian through Abstract and we've been talking ever since. He's great at his craft with a lot of proven experience, also  such a great friend. Grateful for him!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Met Cristian through Abstract and we've been talking ever since. He's great at his craft with a lot of proven experience, also  such a great friend. Grateful for him!

data.metadata: {"description":"Eleni has always been there for me in every step of the way this year. \n\nShe is an authentic person, she will support you through and through and she will be good at what she does!"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Eleni has always been there for me in every step of the way this year. 

She is an authentic person, she will support you through and through and she will be good at what she does!

data.metadata: {"description":"Marcello is one of the best content creators in the gaming sector. His videos bring a lot of energy and clearly explain the topic. He conveys fun and makes you want to try the product. Besides that, he’s one of the most important figures in the Abstract ecosystem and a great friend."}

translation.translatedDescription: Marcello is one of the best content creators in the gaming sector. His videos bring a lot of energy and clearly explain the topic. He conveys fun and makes you want to try the product. Besides that, he’s one of the most important figures in the Abstract ecosystem and a great friend.

data.metadata: {"description":"He was one of the kindest people I met in the Abs Gigachad community  he always supported me, even during my rough times there. I had already left some words expressing my gratitude, and now I’m going to validate them with a monetary gesture!"}

translation.translatedDescription: He was one of the kindest people I met in the Abs Gigachad community  he always supported me, even during my rough times there. I had already left some words expressing my gratitude, and now I’m going to validate them with a monetary gesture!

data.metadata: {"description":"Have just recently met Wagnet but from the convos we've I can instantly tell he's a great guy, no doubt. He reps the pudgy penguin brand all over his timeline and in his own creative way. He fully embraces the pengu. Love how he shows his pengu and abster in his irl life, a true giga chad at heart. Hope we can connect more brother!"}

translation.translatedDescription: Have just recently met Wagnet but from the convos we've I can instantly tell he's a great guy, no doubt. He reps the pudgy penguin brand all over his timeline and in his own creative way. He fully embraces the pengu. Love how he shows his pengu and abster in his irl life, a true giga chad at heart. Hope we can connect more brother!

data.metadata: {"description":"Il est clip plus vite que son ombre, Il est reconnu pour son talent à saisir les moments les plus importants d'un stream  et à les proposer ensuite au format clip. Il est d'ailleurs le premier à avoir obtenu le Badge en rapport à cette activité sur Abstract. \n\nIl a un talent indéniable pour cette activité, mais il ne faut tout de même pas le réduire uniquement à cette activité. Il est très impliqué dans la vie de communauté sur Abstract."}

translation.translatedDescription:
He clips faster than his shadow. He is recognized for his talent in capturing the most important moments of a stream and then offering them in clip format. He is also the first to have obtained the Badge related to this activity on Abstract.

He has an undeniable talent for this activity, but he should not be reduced solely to this activity. He is very involved in community life on Abstract.

data.metadata: {"description":"Quel homme, il était Gigachad, il a perdu le rôle car il a été inactif durant une période, c'est pas pour autant qu'il a abandonné, il a mis les bouchées doubles et récupérer son rôle Gigachad. Quel ténacité, incroyable. \n\nC'est un véritable acharné qui aime vraiment ce qu'il fait, qui participe à la vie de communauté, et qui apporte sa touche personnel du brazil."}

translation.translatedDescription:
What a man, he was Gigachad, he lost the role because he was inactive for a period, but that didn't make him give up, he doubled his efforts and recovered his Gigachad role. What tenacity, incredible.

He is a real hard worker who really loves what he does, who participates in community life, and who brings his personal touch from Brazil.

data.comment: A streamer who raises the bar in Abstract
data.metadata: {"description":"GMB is one of those rare creators whose content is both genuinely useful and truly entertaining. He knows Moody Madness like his own stadium: breaks down the mechanics, shows shortcuts live, hosts his own events (Moody Mondays, tournaments), and keeps a steady streaming cadence.\nI genuinely like what he’s doing this work commands respect and admiration, with a clear focus on quality and community support."}

translation.translatedContent: A streamer who raises the bar in Abstract
translation.translatedDescription:
GMB is one of those rare creators whose content is both genuinely useful and truly entertaining. He knows Moody Madness like his own stadium: breaks down the mechanics, shows shortcuts live, hosts his own events (Moody Mondays, tournaments), and keeps a steady streaming cadence.
I genuinely like what he’s doing this work commands respect and admiration, with a clear focus on quality and community support.

data.comment: Brian Hong, Driving Abstract’s Growth in Korea
data.metadata:
{"description":"In Korea’s rapidly evolving Web3 scene, Brian Hong has become a name that carries weight. As the APAC Growth Lead at Abstract, he has been one of the key figures driving the platform’s rise to prominence in the Korean market. His work has not only elevated Abstract’s presence but also shaped how the community perceives and engages with it.

Brian’s influence comes from his ability to communicate more than just features or announcements. He frames Abstract as an experience worth exploring, a culture worth joining, and a vision that people can be excited about. This approach transformed Abstract from a project people simply knew about into one they genuinely care to be part of.

One of Brian’s defining contributions has been his ability to unite. In a landscape where Korean KOLs often operate independently, he created alignment, bringing fragmented voices together under a shared purpose. This cohesion has amplified Abstract’s impact and strengthened its reputation within the Korean Web3 space.

What makes Brian particularly effective is his mix of strategic thinking and authentic connection. He doesn’t rely on hype or surface-level engagement. Instead, he builds lasting interest by sparking genuine curiosity and fostering meaningful participation. People follow Brian not out of obligation but because they want to be part of what he’s building.

In Korea, Abstract is now a name that resonates. And behind that resonance, there is Brian Hong — a connector, a storyteller, and a leader whose influence is shaping not only a community but a movement."}

translation.translatedContent: Brian Hong, Driving Abstract’s Growth in Korea
translation.translatedDescription:
In Korea’s rapidly evolving Web3 scene, Brian Hong has become a name that carries weight. As the APAC Growth Lead at Abstract, he has been one of the key figures driving the platform’s rise to prominence in the Korean market. His work has not only elevated Abstract’s presence but also shaped how the community perceives and engages with it.

Brian’s influence comes from his ability to communicate more than just features or announcements. He frames Abstract as an experience worth exploring, a culture worth joining, and a vision that people can be excited about. This approach transformed Abstract from a project people simply knew about into one they genuinely care to be part of.

One of Brian’s defining contributions has been his ability to unite. In a landscape where Korean KOLs often operate independently, he created alignment, bringing fragmented voices together under a shared purpose. This cohesion has amplified Abstract’s impact and strengthened its reputation within the Korean Web3 space.

What makes Brian particularly effective is his mix of strategic thinking and authentic connection. He doesn’t rely on hype or surface-level engagement. Instead, he builds lasting interest by sparking genuine curiosity and fostering meaningful participation. People follow Brian not out of obligation but because they want to be part of what he’s building.

In Korea, Abstract is now a name that resonates. And behind that resonance, there is Brian Hong — a connector, a storyteller, and a leader whose influence is shaping not only a community but a movement.

data.metadata: {"description":"Coffee is an insanely talented dev who keeps it real. Humble, sharp, and always down to help, it’s no surprise top teams in the space keep him on speed dial.\n\nHe was especially helpful to me and the Blever team, making sure our Abstract integration was smooth and on time. Total pro."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Coffee is an insanely talented dev who keeps it real. Humble, sharp, and always down to help, it’s no surprise top teams in the space keep him on speed dial.

He was especially helpful to me and the Blever team, making sure our Abstract integration was smooth and on time. Total pro.

data.metadata: {"description":"Cos is a great builder - founder of Blever (launchpad on Abstract and ApeChain) and a great dev.\n\nI have had the pleasure to get to know Cos during my time at Abstract and I am glad to have him in my circle - he always moves with integrity and is always willing to help out other builders."}

translation.translatedDescription:
Cos is a great builder - founder of Blever (launchpad on Abstract and ApeChain) and a great dev.

I have had the pleasure to get to know Cos during my time at Abstract and I am glad to have him in my circle - he always moves with integrity and is always willing to help out other builders.

data.author: 0xFaDd3C023e295FDBA31fc2b57770029318960beD
data.subject: 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000000
data.metadata: {"description":"그는 놀라운 활동량과 정보력으로 한국 앱스트랙트에서 대체 불가한 존재로 자리잡았습니다.\n\n그가 한국 앱스트랙트에서 가지는 영향력은 누구나 인정할겁니다. 항상 좋은 정보들을 빠르게 커뮤니티에 전파시키는 한편, 다른 다양한 커뮤니티와도 끊임없이 교류합니다. KBW에서 실제로 그를 보았고, 그는 현실에서도 너무 훌륭하고 좋은 사람이었습니다. 그가 있어서 행복하고 앞으로도 계속 그가 한국 커뮤니티들을 이끌어 주길 바랍니다. 항상 도움받고있습니다."}

translation.translatedDescription:
With his incredible activity and information, he has established himself as an irreplaceable figure in the Korean Abstract community.

Everyone will acknowledge the influence he holds within the Korean Abstract community. He consistently disseminates valuable information quickly to the community while also constantly interacting with various other communities. I actually saw him at KBW, and he was a truly wonderful and kind person in person. I am happy to have him, and I hope he continues to lead the Korean communities. I am always receiving help from him.

data.author: 0xA270Bde2ecbD72aD259D02D7cCB47D2d95eF94eD
data.subject: 0xCCB0e7366CDfBFD471110ff02632F0542ed0283f
data.metadata: {"description":"When I think of Marcelo, I naturally think of Real Madrid’s number 12. And there’s a small resemblance between the two. Both have skills, different ones, of course but Marcello is an excellent content creator and streamer. You always have a great time watching him; he perfectly reflects Abstract’s good vibes. And I don’t think he’s invited everywhere for no reason… He knows how to create a great atmosphere just as well as he knows how to be serious and highlight projects. He has the ability to stay true to himself while adapting to his audience. A man of quality, He’s a real reference within Abstract."}

translation.translatedDescription: When I think of Marcelo, I naturally think of Real Madrid’s number 12. And there’s a small resemblance between the two. Both have skills, different ones, of course but Marcello is an excellent content creator and streamer. You always have a great time watching him; he perfectly reflects Abstract’s good vibes. And I don’t think he’s invited everywhere for no reason… He knows how to create a great atmosphere just as well as he knows how to be serious and highlight projects. He has the ability to stay true to himself while adapting to his audience. A man of quality, He’s a real reference within Abstract.

data.author: 0x6500555EEAAA4A0f040c558Ec0282c342daa5259
data.subject: 0xFaDd3C023e295FDBA31fc2b57770029318960beD
data.comment: Sayyes? The Man Who Led Me to the Path of a Giga Chad!
data.metadata:
{
  "description": ""Sayyes" in Korean, this can be interpreted as "I can do anything, no matter what." True to his name, he is incredibly wealthy. as a member of the "Lonely Trader" Telegram group, he is literally a legendary trader... In his prime, there were times he earned 100 million KRW in a single day.

Yet, for some reason... he jumped into the world of Abstract and reached the Platinum tier in the shortest time recorded in Korea. he spent over 400 million KRW! Since he clearly has the capital, he aggressively participated in Abstract dApps and shared his reviews with us.

He personally demonstrated that Abstract XP isn't gained simply by spending a vast amount of money, but by securing high rankings efficiently to maximize XP gain.

Additionally, alongside Joy and Minbuu, he streams the video series "I Buy Coins Alone" every week on the Abstract Portal, drawing many people into the world of Abstract. Based on these contributions, he also acquired the Giga Chad title the most prestigious role in Abstract in a short period.

Perhaps he looked kindly upon my hard work... He passed on his methods for obtaining the Giga Chad role, encouraging me by saying, "Someone who works as hard as you do in Korea deserves this role!" He taught me strategies like deep diving into a single Abstract dApp to educate users and becoming an ambassador. i am still deeply grateful to Sayyes for his mentorship.

I also met him in person at KBW 2025 and got his autograph. to give you a real life review: he is quite fashionable and stylish. he has high social intelligence and brings laughter to many people.

In fact, it is no exaggeration to say that I received the Giga Chad role thanks to his advice.

Thank you so much for being with Abstract and with me!"
}

translation.translatedContent: Sayyes? The Man Who Led Me to the Path of a Giga Chad!
translation.translatedDescription:
"Sayyes" in Korean can be interpreted as "I can do anything, no matter what." True to his name, he is incredibly wealthy. As a member of the "Lonely Trader" Telegram group, he is literally a legendary trader... In his prime, there were times he earned 100 million KRW in a single day.

Yet, for some reason... he jumped into the world of Abstract and reached the Platinum tier in the shortest time recorded in Korea. He spent over 400 million KRW! Since he clearly has the capital, he aggressively participated in Abstract dApps and shared his reviews with us.

He personally demonstrated that Abstract XP isn't gained simply by spending a vast amount of money, but by securing high rankings efficiently to maximize XP gain.

Additionally, alongside Joy and Minbuu, he streams the video series "I Buy Coins Alone" every week on the Abstract Portal, drawing many people into the world of Abstract. Based on these contributions, he also acquired the Giga Chad title, the most prestigious role in Abstract, in a short period.

Perhaps he looked kindly upon my hard work... He passed on his methods for obtaining the Giga Chad role, encouraging me by saying, "Someone who works as hard as you do in Korea deserves this role!" He taught me strategies like deep diving into a single Abstract dApp to educate users and becoming an ambassador. I am still deeply grateful to Sayyes for his mentorship.

I also met him in person at KBW 2025 and got his autograph. To give you a real-life review: he is quite fashionable and stylish. He has high social intelligence and brings laughter to many people.

In fact, it is no exaggeration to say that I received the Giga Chad role thanks to his advice.

Thank you so much for being with Abstract and with me!

data.author: 0xA96E173551f07aF35F2bc4cBCD8D3a21E8DA39BC
data.subject: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a

translation.translatedDescription: Cristian leads with love and positivity. His presence makes you feel warm and welcome in any community he is a part of. I had the great pleasure of meeting him in person at NFT NYC, and that only reinforced what I felt online. He is a gifted content creator who is able to pivot seamlessly from providing thoughtful analysis to contagious laughter. I know he's someone I'll vibe with for many years to come. I've recently learned more about his expertise beyond crypto, and it only deepened my respect for him. Bonus Fact: Cristian is a pro Twerker!

data.subject: 0xFdBB45EF56C306467bA5CC70E6f2965eC7bB34Fe
data.metadata: {"description":"Deko is one of the most supportive people i have met in web3. i dont know how he does it, but he seems to be everywhere all the time. He is always supporting other people's streams, social media posts, and even helping players in game. A great friend to have"}

translation.translatedDescription: Deko is one of the most supportive people i have met in web3. i dont know how he does it, but he seems to be everywhere all the time. He is always supporting other people's streams, social media posts, and even helping players in game. A great friend to have

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0x68e33A587f1d697c5e0f8b8794cFA304B41a61e2
data.metadata: {"description":"I met Sanjay briefly through Elisa in Dubai. He was very warm and welcoming. I had no idea who he was or what his experience was in the space, then I found out he was this very well-known and recognized gaming + multi-chain creator.\n\nI have had the pleasure of watching him from the sidelines and through friends in common, and I have nothing but great things to say about his professionalism, his wit and quality content."}

translation.translatedDescription:
I met Sanjay briefly through Elisa in Dubai. He was very warm and welcoming. I had no idea who he was or what his experience was in the space, then I found out he was this very well-known and recognized gaming + multi-chain creator.

I have had the pleasure of watching him from the sidelines and through friends in common, and I have nothing but great things to say about his professionalism, his wit and quality content.

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0x25954Fb49bFc6A2A09770be5CCA756c8676F31ba

translation.translatedDescription:
I had the pleasure of meeting Becca in Dubai this year for Token 2049. She was one of the kindest and nicest people to come up to me and involve me in the activities.

I was able to connect with her on a friendly level and realize what a hard-working woman she is. She is remarkable and has made so much impact in Web3, not only through her job at AP, but also in the wider Pudgy Penguin Ecosystem.

It's been a joy to watch her live her dreams, achieve her goals, and now being part of the team.

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0xee15Bf34284464a7d41c6162DB0d364b3B6768CF
data.metadata:
{"description":"Marianne is an incredible human being, not only she is a good friend in the space, but also a skilled professional.

She has a masterclass when it comes to community building. By building Keewy she has demonstrated the entire space the importance of community retention through well-thought incentives, activations and content.

People in the space often forget how community is the backbone to every successful project, she has proven that. 

Besides building top tier communities, her skillset as a streamer and a content creator is top notch. Heavily respected in the space across chains, she has established herself as a rising star in Web3.

I'm grateful to have worked with her advising on projects within Abstract and will continue to do so if I have the opportunity!"}

translation.translatedDescription:
Marianne is an incredible human being, not only she is a good friend in the space, but also a skilled professional.

She has a masterclass when it comes to community building. By building Keewy she has demonstrated the entire space the importance of community retention through well-thought incentives, activations and content.

People in the space often forget how community is the backbone to every successful project, she has proven that. 

Besides building top tier communities, her skillset as a streamer and a content creator is top notch. Heavily respected in the space across chains, she has established herself as a rising star in Web3.

I'm grateful to have worked with her advising on projects within Abstract and will continue to do so if I have the opportunity!

data.author: 0x0559FB44AbE3b55074593E22d7E8DFC73750038a
data.subject: 0x2CCFF304eF578B238eE82E1D1d53c34e80B48ad6

translation.translatedDescription:
AL is an incredible guy. He's always super supportive of others in the Igloo and the extended pudgy community, a well as Abstract.

I find joy watching his journey in Web3 and how he includes his family, his lifestyle creating content for his audience.

I wish there were more people like AL!

He is a kind person and great at what he does, with a lot of experience behind content and marketing.

A great person and a businessman in what he does.

translation.translatedDescription: I was feeling a bit stuck in my own web3 bubble and wanted to join some new groups  that’s how I ended up discovering the Gorilla community through your group. I had already seen your videos, so I decided to join, and it’s been a great decision so far. The people are amazing  always good conversations, solid calls, and they truly live and breathe web3. I’m really glad I got to know them!

data.author: 0x50641a31170bdC620f1c90f00C9d8f8e6E095BD6
data.subject: 0xcD9aA0F51ae128575af8b62e14c5B2E2Baf8a153
data.metadata:
{"description":"GMB est un gigachad solidement implanté sur la chain, ambassadeur AOB et Moody, et bénéficie d’une notoriété grandissante sur Abstract.
Très suivi lors de ses streams, il exerce une influence réelle sur la communauté, partageant ses analyses et insights avec clarté et passion.

Ses contenus sont toujours pertinents et instructifs, allant des conseils de trading à l’analyse des projets NFT et DeFi.
Personnellement, j’apprécie le suivre régulièrement"}

translation.translatedDescription:
GMB is a gigachad firmly established on the chain, an AOB and Moody ambassador, and enjoys growing recognition on Abstract.
Widely followed during his streams, he exerts a real influence on the community, sharing his analyses and insights with clarity and passion.

His content is always relevant and informative, ranging from trading advice to analysis of NFT and DeFi projects.
Personally, I enjoy following him regularly.

data.author: 0x489235875f10a4e968b0eC06d396A0D8E5bEe17D
data.subject: 0x70Ec1731888C5Ae530359c3068d77eE590507359

translation.translatedDescription: SEMB is a friend from the Abstract community a true community member, always active and sharing content about the Pudgy Penguins. He’s a strong pillar when it comes to our community, always helpful and willing to assist new members. He’s definitely an important person for us, and that’s why I’m leaving a positive review for him as a way to thank him for everything!

data.author: 0x3B8fD3757D38E33E69BC40Dd9fF42fb0BEc35Ec5
data.subject: 0x50641a31170bdC620f1c90f00C9d8f8e6E095BD6

translation.translatedDescription: He is a person committed to the abstract, I see him everywhere on X spreading the green chain. He's one of the first giga chads, an OG. He totally deserves his role.
